commentline¶

inherit_from: [‘comment’]

Summary¶

keyword default attribute value
alpha 0.9    
    alias alpha_channel
    type float
    unique True
       
color black    
    unique True
       
linewidth 1.8    
    type float
    unique True
       
position None    
    type float
    unique True
       
rank 100    
    type int
    unique True
       
style [‘-‘]    
    unique True
       

Keywords¶

alpha¶

default: 0.9

this is a percentage of opacity for the alpha channel, 0 is transparent, 1 is full color

attribute value
alias alpha_channel
type float
unique True

color¶

default: black

attribute value
unique True

linewidth¶

default: 1.8

attribute value
type float
unique True

position¶

default: None

attribute value
type float
unique True

rank¶

default: 100

The rank determines at which point of drawing this particular comment should be drawn. Negatives values mean before any curves are plotted, positive values mean mean after plotting the curves. The comments are plotted in the order of the rank so the user has control over the order in which graphical comments are drawn.

attribute value
type int
unique True

style¶

default: -

style used for drawing the line.

attribute value
unique True
